query:
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS password_hash VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS account_status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS approved_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS approved_by INT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user Bk7aCGrDyRKGN1q.root --database T3XiKgmnDLqJNf6z2vN3GW --execute 
ALTER TABLE users 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS password_hash VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS account_status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS approved_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS approved_by INT NULL;
